post.author: example.com
post.text: Why is the new Canvas launch being discussed today?
parent_texts: A parent post asks whether the launch affects existing users.

context_documents.title: Canvas launch notes
context_documents.text: The launch notes say the Canvas release adds a collaborative workspace and keeps existing projects available.

context_documents.title: Canvas pricing update
context_documents.text: The pricing update says existing users keep their current plan while the new workspace features roll out.

context_documents.title: Bluesky discussion thread
context_documents.text: A public Bluesky thread discusses why the launch is circulating and links it to the workspace announcement.

evidence.text: The Canvas release adds a collaborative workspace and keeps existing projects available.
Existing users keep their current plan while the new workspace features roll out.
The public discussion ties the post to the workspace announcement circulating on Bluesky.
